title: sedum mucizonia subsp. mucizonia
intro: Sedum mucizonia subsp. mucizonia is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family, commonly known as the orpine or mountain jelly plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, Sedum mucizonia subsp. mucizonia is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
